Our Promise
Our Approach

A more collaborative,
proactive approach
to care.

No need to send residents offsite or spend time and money on in-house personnel. With Olivera Health, you confidently and proactively deliver high-quality care to residents when and where they need it.

We become a true extension of your care team — built on specialized expertise, accountability, and genuine long-term partnership.

Explore Our Services
Collaborative Care · Coordinated, compassionate, comprehensive.
What We Offer

Our Services

A comprehensive suite of clinical services designed for senior care facilities and the residents they serve.

6
01
SNF Primary Care

Dedicated primary care for skilled nursing facilities — consistent, personalized medical attention on your campus.

02
Care Coordination

Seamless coordination across care teams, specialists, and facilities so nothing falls through the cracks.

03
Remote Patient Monitoring

Around-the-clock vital monitoring with cutting-edge technology — act before issues escalate.

04
Chronic Care Management

Structured, ongoing support for complex chronic conditions — reducing complications and improving quality of life.

05
Medical Directorship

Experienced medical directors who set and enforce clinical standards — accountability at every level.

06
Behavioral Health

Integrated mental and behavioral health services that address the whole person — care too often overlooked in senior settings.

Why Choose Us

Why partner with
Olivera Health?

We don't just provide services — we become a true extension of your care team, built on experience, accountability, and genuine partnership with every facility we serve.

Get In Touch
At-Home Care · Personalized care wherever residents need it.
01
Specialized Team of Providers

A large, highly trained team specializing in geriatric primary care — built for the complexity of senior populations.

02
Superior Standard of Care

An established clinical standard set by our medical director, creating superior accountability and security for providers and facilities alike.

03
Cutting-Edge Technology

A robust suite of in-person and virtual services leverages the latest monitoring technology to optimize outcomes at all hours.

04
Industry Veterans

Founded by seasoned healthcare veterans who understand the protocols, systems, and patient demographics unique to each facility.

Our Mission
"Our mission at Olivera Health is simply to deliver more. More preventative care. More personal care. More access to quality care. More continuity of care."
— Olivera Health Group Founders
The Olivera Difference

With Olivera, facilities experience real results.

  • Improved quality of care for every resident
  • Better health outcomes across the continuum
  • Significantly reduced liability exposure
  • More clinical services available on campus
  • Fewer preventable rehospitalizations
  • Higher resident and family satisfaction
